_comment: Delivery OS — the standing deploy lane POLICY (OS v6 #7; SDLC-state-authorized as of founder directive 2026-06-25). This file is POLICY, not authorization: it declares WHAT may run (named action classes), to WHICH target env, and the irreversible/destructive guard denylist. It does NOT decide whether a deploy may run — that is decided per-invocation by templates/tools/deployment-auth.mjs from live SDLC state (verification + approvals + founder-review-if-applicable). Authorization depends on STATE, never on who runs the agent: an agent may deploy iff the SDLC state authorizes the target env, and the lane wrapper never deploys past an unfinished governance step. The deployment-operator reads this file through templates/tools/deploy-lane.mjs; it does NOT widen it. Copy this file to the repo root as `.deploy-lane.json`, fill the targets + target_env, and add the matching .claude/settings.json allow-rules (docs/deploy-lane-setup.md) ONCE.

freeze._comment: Founder kill-switch (OPTIONAL). frozen=true is a hard stop on ALL deploys regardless of SDLC state — the one founder override that REMOVES authorization. It never GRANTS it: an absent/false freeze does NOT block; SDLC state-auth governs. This replaces the old per-repo `ratified.by` signature, which is gone — authorization is now state, not a one-time signature.

actions._comment: Each key is a named action CLASS in the deploy POLICY. `cmd`+`args` are the exact underlying command run for an in-scope invocation; extra args passed on the CLI are APPENDED. `target_env` (dev|preview|prod) is the SDLC environment deployment-auth.mjs is asked to authorize for this class — an unknown/missing value is treated as `prod` (fail-closed, strictest). `forward_only:true` marks a migration class the operator may run unattended once authorized; a down/rollback must NOT be declared here (it is irreversible ⇒ out of scope by design). Remove a class to drop it from the policy.

vercel-deploy-prod.description: Production deploy of the API/SPA on the Vercel+Supabase plane.

supabase-migrate-forward.description: Apply pending forward-only migrations to the system-of-record DB (via the session pooler, per the deploy-vercel-supabase playbook).

guards._comment: Belt-and-braces fail-closed denylist, enforced by deploy-lane.mjs AFTER state-authorization. Even if a class is somehow declared and authorized, an underlying command matching any of these substrings is REFUSED. Irreversible/destructive ops are never in any lane.
